## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to its issue and roadmap task
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy -D warnings`, and `cargo test` pass
- [ ] Tests added or updated (for bug fixes / features)
- [ ] `cryo_test` data validation run, or marked N/A with a reason
- [ ] No secrets, RPC URLs, or IP addresses added
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
